2292780.name: Nqc : Non Qualia Character
2292780.description:
Nqc is an adventure RPG about a man who has lost his memory trying to find ‘who am I’ in the digital world.

What is a human being defined by?

You are going to become Tris, a networked being, and enter the crumbled game ‘ANTAGONIST’. In that game world, you will meet a conscious NPCs and follow in the footsteps of another cloned you.

Multidimention

This world is a mixture of 2D and 3D and these have different mechanics.
[Real World/Game within Game/Memories]
Travel across dimensions to decide the fate of a twisted digital world.

Digital Apocalypse

'NPCs who realized that they were in a game that was collapsing' and
The story of 'a person who learned about the brain data he was cloned'
2292780.supported_languages: 英语, 韩语, 日语
